title: Urgent advocacy secures business-winning outcomes
body_paragraphs: OTR Group sought urgent advice and advocacy with Federal and State governments regarding the interpretation and compliance obligations of new legislation. Ace Strategies led a government engagement campaign that secured written advice allowing OTR Group to move and invest with confidence.
quote: At a critical and time-sensitive juncture, Ace Strategies moved from brief to strategy implementation at a pace that evidenced their authority… we secured a favourable outcome that was widely deemed unachievable.

title: Medical device approval supports patient wellbeing
body_paragraphs: Mood State Medical needed to overcome TGA certification issues for their flagship medical vaporiser. Ace Strategies supported the team to navigate the complex stakeholder process through a strategic engagement and communications campaign supported by trusted relationships.
quote: Their strong and trusted relationships in Canberra, policy experience and strategic solutions have helped to fast-track our business aspirations.

title: Enabling innovative healthcare solutions to cut through
body_paragraphs: Ace Strategies supported Aspen Medical to strengthen its position in the South Australian market by building strategic relationships, showcasing capabilities, and aligning with government health priorities through an integrated government relations and communications plan.
quote: Ace Strategies helped us to strengthen our relationship with the South Australian Government and raise awareness of our health sector solutions.

title: Westering — giving the aged care sector a helping hand
image_alt: Helping Hand Aged Care development concept
body_paragraphs: Helping Hand sought to grow its footprint in Whyalla and North Adelaide to support two major projects, including a landmark $320 million aged care and retirement living development. Ace Strategies designed an integrated government relations, communications, stakeholder engagement and media management plan.
quote: Aged care facilities in South Australia are at capacity… our precinct will bring much-needed relief and community connection.

title: Building sovereign infrastructure and commercial space technologies
body_paragraphs: Terram Astra is focused on building sovereign capabilities in orbital debris mitigation and multi-domain testing. Ace Strategies developed and implemented a stakeholder engagement and communications plan to strengthen awareness across investor, customer, and government communities.

title: Strategic communications support global expansion of cutting-edge solutions
body_paragraphs: Ace Strategies supported Blacktree Technology to overhaul its strategic communications materials, including re-writing and designing its quad chart, capabilities statement, product catalogue, and a technical infographic explaining a complex SATCOM architecture.
quote: Many thanks Ace Strategies — it was a pleasure having you support us!

title: Regional South Australia's strategic voice in Adelaide
body_paragraphs: Ace Strategies developed an Advocacy, Communications and Media Plan 2024–2027 for the Flinders Ranges Council, providing strategic direction to achieve priority projects including improved water quality, childcare capabilities, community infrastructure, and new tourism ventures.
quote: The Advocacy, Communication and Engagement plan has helped Council to prioritise and be effective with our lobbying and planning — they really delivered.

title: New community hub for a proud and historic club
image_alt: Adelaide City Football Club concept render
body_paragraphs: Ace Strategies developed and implemented a strategic engagement and communications plan to raise awareness of the club's facility development, secure stakeholder support, and deliver funding commitments for new junior program infrastructure.
quote: The advocacy and strategic support has helped progress significant community infrastructure projects — they exude passion and deliver a personalised service.

title: Hindmarsh Island eco-village to rejuvenate the regional economy
body_paragraphs: Island Heights seeks to develop 600 acres on Hindmarsh Island. Ace Strategies supported an integrated government relations, stakeholder engagement, communications and media management plan, including engagement with the Ngarrindjeri community on their connection to traditional lands.

title: Pitch masterclass supports local businesses to stand on global stage
body_paragraphs: Ace Strategies developed and delivered a tailored Tradeshow Pitch Training Masterclass in partnership with Defence SA, equipping participants with practical tools for exhibitions and industry forums.
quote: The practical exercises helped refine how we communicate our capabilities with confidence and clarity. Stronger communication leads to stronger connections.

title: Delivering critical infrastructure to support housing growth
body_paragraphs: SA Water is investing $1.2 billion to upgrade large-scale infrastructure to directly create an extra 11,000 homes. Ace Strategies provided strategic oversight of communications and government relations, including stakeholder engagement and mentoring of team members.
quote: The attention to detail and strategic approach to stakeholder engagement and communications was effective and highly valued.

title: Empowering critical business decisions to achieve success
body_paragraphs: Ace Strategies facilitated a collaborative strategy session for AGPN's board and executive leaders, and developed strategic communications materials to drive advocacy and funding support for bespoke partner programs including The Breast Screen Initiative.
quote: The strategic guidance and knowledge provided empowered us to make critical business decisions and achieve success.

title: Delivering workforce solutions that secure our nation
body_paragraphs: Since Ace Strategies was engaged, the Techforce Personnel defence business has grown significantly, securing contracts with Austal, ASDAM Group, and ASC, Australia's submarine company.
quote: I have highly valued the insight, strategic guidance and connections provided, which has transformed our Defence sector business.

title: Breaking new ground in Australian Defence innovation
body_paragraphs: Ace Strategies supported SYOS Aerospace's strategic entry into the Australian market through targeted stakeholder engagement and communications, securing national and international media attention at the Indo Pacific International Maritime Exposition.
quote: Ace Strategies' insight into the Defence landscape, connections to decision-makers, and ability to navigate complex environments has been instrumental to our successful entry into Australia.
quote_author: Sam Vye — Founder and Chief Executive Officer

title: Reputation management during complex times
body_paragraphs: BIORG required urgent reputation management support through an unforeseen crisis. Ace Strategies managed the stakeholder and media relationships with professionalism and discretion, protecting the company's market position.
quote: At short notice, the Ace team stepped in to provide reputation management advice — it brought clarity and calmness during a chaotic time.
